title: AGEE: A Multi-Dimensional Process-Level Metric for Evaluating Agent Exploration over Knowledge Graphs
description: Reference implementation accompanying the Knowledge-Based Systems article "AGEE: A Multi-Dimensional Process-Level Metric for Evaluating Agent Exploration over Knowledge Graphs." Includes the AGEE (Agent Graph Exploration Efficiency) metric, all baselines, the full experimental pipeline, prompt templates, raw agent trajectories, and a Docker reproducibility image.
